title: Post-006 Client-Only Laptop Posture Opening Decision
objective: Consume the published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 006 authority chain and decide whether the project may open a separate bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation packet next, while keeping resumed feature delivery closed unless a later gate explicitly opens it.
active_role: Olares Developer Residency Client-Only Posture Decision Operator
dependency_note: Packet 006 is the publication and host-mirror parity gate for the Dev Residency proof accumulated in Packets 001 through 005. Packet 007 executed as the decision-only successor and selected opening Packet 008 as the later bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation lane without implying resumed feature delivery.
required_inputs: Published host residency, toolchain, validation, and publication continuity evidence from Dev Residency Packets 001 through 006
The milestone-plan sequencing rule that client-only laptop confirmation precedes resumed feature delivery
The continued ruling that GitHub remains canonical and `/home/olares/code/apex` remains the authoritative host mirror
The still-closed boundary around feature delivery, public ingress widening, AI-services expansion, code-hosting transition, runtime/service mutation, package/lockfile mutation, and old-clone mutation
decision_requirements: Decide only whether the next lane may be a bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation packet.
Keep resumed feature delivery closed unless a later packet explicitly opens that gate after the client-only milestone closes.
Preserve GitHub as canonical and `/home/olares/code/apex` as the host mirror.
Do not perform source/test execution, new toolchain materialization, package mutation, lockfile mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, or host transition work inside this decision packet.
explicit_no_go_items: new toolchain materialization or validation retry
sql_permission_note: Decision only. This packet authorizes no database writes, source/test execution, package mutation, lockfile mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, old-clone mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
decision_rationale: The published Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 006 authority chain now covers the ordered Milestone 1 through Milestone 3 prerequisites: host residency baseline, minimum host toolchain/runtime proof, and publication continuity.
The milestone plan explicitly sequences client-only laptop posture confirmation after publication continuity and before resumed feature delivery.

No evidence in the published authority chain conflicts with the client-only claim; the chain preserves GitHub as canonical, `/home/olares/code/apex` as the host mirror, and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` as observe-only historical evidence.
The next truthful step is therefore a separate bounded confirmation packet, not feature delivery or any runtime, service, package, lockfile, hosting, public ingress, AI-services, or old-clone change.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 008 - Client-Only Laptop Posture Confirmation
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a decision-only gate. Packet 007 selects opening a later bounded client-only laptop posture confirmation packet and explicitly keeps resumed feature delivery closed. It does not perform source/test execution, validation retry, new toolchain materialization, package or lockfile mutation, runtime or service mutation, public ingress widening, AI-services expansion, Gitea or canonical-hosting transition, old-clone mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 008 - Client-Only Laptop Posture Confirmation` only as a separate bounded confirmation packet before any resumed feature-delivery readiness gate is considered.
